commands.payload:
Feval.Cli 1.7.0
Copyright (C) 2026 HeChao

  run        (Default Verb) Running in standalone mode or connect a remote
             service

  using      Set default using namespaces on launch

  alias      Remote feval service address aliases

  config     Config feval command line tool

  help       Display more information on a specific command.

  version    Display version information.

result.stderr:
Feval.Cli 1.7.0
Copyright (C) 2026 HeChao

  --standalone        Running in standalone mode

  -s, --scan          Scan all available service host in local network
                      automatically

  -v, --verbose       Set output to verbose messages (standalone mode only)

  -e, --eval          Evaluate expression(s) and exit (standalone mode only)

  -f, --file          Execute expressions from a script file and exit
                      (standalone mode only)

  --help              Display this help screen.

  --version           Display version information.

  address (pos. 0)    Remote service address formatted like: 127.0.0.1:9999

commands.payload:
Feval.Cli 1.7.0
Copyright (C) 2026 HeChao

  --standalone        Running in standalone mode

  -s, --scan          Scan all available service host in local network
                      automatically

  -v, --verbose       Set output to verbose messages (standalone mode only)

  -e, --eval          Evaluate expression(s) and exit (standalone mode only)

  -f, --file          Execute expressions from a script file and exit
                      (standalone mode only)

  --help              Display this help screen.

  --version           Display version information.

  address (pos. 0)    Remote service address formatted like: 127.0.0.1:9999
